name: Quaker Choc-Oat-Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Quaker oats (quick or old-fashioned, uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Beat margarine and sugars together until creamy.
3. Add eggs, milk, and vanilla; beat well.
4. Mix in flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Stir in oats, chocolate morsels, and nuts.
6. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
- For easy bar cookies, press the dough into the bottom of an ungreased 13 x 9 inch baking pan instead.
7. Bake cookies for 9 to 10 minutes for chewy texture or 12 to 13 minutes for crispy texture.
- Bake bar cookies for 35 to 40 minutes until light golden brown.
8. Allow cookies to cool for 1 minute on the sheet, then transfer to a wire rack.
9. Cool completely. Approximately 5 dozen cookies.
